hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.rs"'; then cd /Users/tfinklea/git/tesela && cargo fmt --all 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -qE 'feat\(m[0-9]'; then echo 'AUTO_RELEASE: Milestone feature committed — dispatch release agent'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.env|\.secret|credentials\.'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Secrets go in macOS Keychain, not files. See ~/CLAUDE.md'; exit 2; fi
